category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Solomon Islands.

title.en: China-to-Solomon Islands EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入所罗门群岛：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入索羅門群島：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Solomon Islands SISO standards context, Solomon Power grid-connection expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与所罗门群岛SISO标准背景、Solomon Power并网预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與索羅門群島SISO標準背景、Solomon Power併網預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Solomon Islands, the practical gaps are project engineering, utility connection, IEC safety and EMC evidence, connector conversion, and tropical marine durability rather than a confirmed charger-specific national certification route. Solomon Islands uses 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply through Solomon Power / SIEA and project power systems, so frequency matches China but nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Public or fleet deployments should be specified toward IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC, not North American J1772. GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 chargers need hardware, signaling, and communication redesign before use with IEC 62196 / CCS2 vehicles or networks.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入所罗门群岛时，实务差距主要是项目工程、公用事业接入、IEC安全及EMC证据、接口转换以及热带海洋环境耐久性，而不是已确认的充电桩整机专门国家认证路径。所罗门群岛通过Solomon Power / SIEA及项目供电系统采用230/400 V、50 Hz供电，频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。公共或车队部署应按IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流方向准备，而非北美J1772方向。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930充电桩在用于IEC 62196 / CCS2车辆或网络前，需要进行硬件、信号和通信改造。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入索羅門群島時，實務差距主要是項目工程、公用事業接入、IEC安全及EMC證據、接口轉換以及熱帶海洋環境耐久性，而不是已確認的充電樁整機專門國家認證路徑。索羅門群島通過Solomon Power / SIEA及項目供電系統採用230/400 V、50 Hz供電，頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。公共或車隊部署應按IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流方向準備，而非北美J1772方向。GB/T 20234和GB/T 27930充電樁在用於IEC 62196 / CCS2車輛或網絡前，需要進行硬體、信號和通訊改造。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SISO scope determination, Solomon Power connection approval, SIEA approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, fleet operators, aid-funded projects, network operators, and installers should verify current Solomon Islands requirements with qualified local professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SISO适用范围裁定、Solomon Power并网批准、SIEA批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、车队运营商、援助资金项目、网络运营商及安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格当地专业人士核验现行所罗门群岛要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SISO適用範圍裁定、Solomon Power併網批准、SIEA批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、車隊運營商、援助資金項目、網絡運營商及安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格當地專業人士核驗現行索羅門群島要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
